EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The user {subject.account.name} deleted report "{object.name}" in PT Application Firewall on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} deleted the account {object.account.name} in PT Application Firewall on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} failed to delete report "{object.name}" in PT Application Firewall on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} deleted protected application {object.name} in PT Application Firewall on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} failed to delete the account {object.account.name} in PT Application Firewall on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} failed to delete protected application {object.name} in PT Application Firewall on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} deleted rule "{object.name}" in PT Application Firewall on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} failed to delete node {object.value} in PT Application Firewall on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} failed to delete traffic profile "{object.name}" in PT Application Firewall on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} deleted node {object.value} in PT Application Firewall on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} deleted traffic profile "{object.name}" in PT Application Firewall on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} failed to delete listening IP address {object.value} in PT Application Firewall on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} failed to delete rule "{object.name}" in PT Application Firewall on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} deleted listening IP address {object.value} in PT Application Firewall on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} deleted object "{object.name}" of the "{object.type}" type in PT Application Firewall on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} failed to delete object "{object.name}" of the "{object.type}" type in PT Application Firewall on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} deleted private SSL key {object.name} in PT Application Firewall on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} failed to delete private SSL key {object.name} in PT Application Firewall on host {event_src.host}
